arts.ttl: Chelsea and Manchester United face transfer competition for striker as clause revealed
arts.sum: Juventus have set their sights on reported Chelsea and Manchester United target Liam Delap as a potential successor to Dusan Vlahovic. Chelsea and United are also keeping tabs on Delap's development, while City have a buy-back clause and negotiated a 20% sell-on when they sold the forward to Ipswich for £20million in July.

arts.ttl: Levi Colwill claims rivals should be 'scared' to face Chelsea
arts.sum: Chelsea centre-back Levi Colwill boldly claimed that his side are "battering most teams" while lauding the impact of manager Enzo Maresca.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa team news vs Chelsea confirmed as Unai Emery makes two changes
arts.sum: Villa starting XI: Martinez, Cash, Konsa, Pau, Digne, Kamara, Tielemans, Philogene, McGinn, Rogers, Watkins. Opponents Chelsea were winless in all eight league matches last season against the teams that finished in the top four - and they've only taken one point from three meetings with those sides in 2024-25.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Aston Villa line-ups: Three Blues changes, two for Villa
arts.sum: Chelsea v Aston Villa. The post Chelsea v Aston Villa line-ups: Three Blues changes, two for Villa appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Chelsea team news: Enzo Maresca names unorthodox formation for Aston Villa game
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca seemingly names an unorthodox Chelsea XI for Sunday's Premier League fixture versus Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Chelsea sent early team news hint ahead of Aston Villa as Enzo Maresca faces big decision
arts.sum: That match saw Enzo Fernandez recalled to the starting lineup and wear the captain’s armband. Chelsea are back in Premier League action this afternoon (Sunday) as they take on Aston Villa at Stamford Bridge (1.30pm kick-off).

arts.ttl: I never wanted to leave Chelsea - I was forced to leave before Villa saved me
arts.sum: Over the summer, Maatsen expressed his eagerness for the challenge at Villa: "It’s a challenge for me to come here and show people that I’m capable of doing those things on the highest level," he said. Ian Maatsen is set to face his former club Chelsea for the first time since his summer move, as he gears up to visit Stamford Bridge with Aston Villa on Sunday in the Premier League (1:30pm kick-off).

arts.ttl: Why don’t Chelsea have a sponsor on the front of their jersey?
arts.sum: Following the expiry of a front-of-shirt sponsorship deal worth £120 million ($152m) with telecommunications firm Three, who sponsored Chelsea’s jerseys from 2020 to 2023, The Blues have yet to formally agree a new long-term sponsor. Previously, Chelsea had come to an agreement with streaming platform Paramount+ for sponsorship of their kit of the 2023/24 season, which was ultimately blocked by a Premier League ruling .

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Aston Villa - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as The Blues host Unai Emery's side at Stamford Bridge plus updates from Tottenham vs Fulham
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for all the action from the two Premier League games of Chelsea vs Aston Villa and Tottenham vs Fulham including the live score, team news and updates.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea could now miss out on signing £50m winger because of his representatives
arts.sum: They want him to stay put.
